html:
Bone Shards are an item obtained by hammering Skeletons. They are used to craft the Saddlehorn.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Bone Shards can also be obtained by hammering Bones, destroying Tumbleweeds, attacking Hound Mounds, or as vomited gifts from friendly Catcoons. They are used in several additional crafting recipes, including the Bucket-o-poop, the Rain Hat, the Rain Coat and the Eyebrella.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Bone Shards can be obtained by digging up X Marks the Spot treasure chests and by Hammering Spoiled Fish. Using a Trawl Net in the Deep Ocean also has a chance to yield Bone Shards. They are used in a variety of additional crafting recipes such as the Snakeskin Hat, the Snakeskin Jacket, the Captain Hat and the Pirate Hat, and can also be used at the Volcano Altar of Snackrifice in Dry Season to delay the next eruption by 4 day segments, or 1/4th of a day.

In the Hamlet DLC, Bone Shards can be obtained by digging through Dung Piles. Pugalisks drop between 22-46 bone shards, between 42-55 Snake Bones and between 1-4 Spoiled Fish which can be hammered into 2 bone shards each.

Trivia

  • Bone Shards were first introduced in the Reign of Giants DLC. In the Quality of Life update, they were retroactively added to the base game.

Gallery

  • Bone Shards as seen in the poster for A Little Rain Must Fall update.

"boneshard"
“Bits of bone.”
–Wilson
“I don't think they make good tinder.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang crush into even smaller bones!”
–Wolfgang
“Choking hazard.”
–Wendy
“PIECES OF STRUCTURAL SUPPORT SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“Remnants of a life well lived.”
–Wickerbottom
“I wish I knew how to make bread.”
–Woodie
“Grind them bones.”
–Maxwell
“Dense and sharp! Quite optimal for weapon crafting.”
–Wagstaff
“Bits öf my enemies.”
–Wigfrid
“Boney bits.”
–Webber
“I don't think a cast will help now.”
–Walani
“I could make a hearty stock with these.”
–Warly
“Bits o'bone.”
–Woodlegs
“IT DOTH POINTY PARTS”
–Wilba
“Sharp. Ouch!”
–Wormwood
“Who knew bone shards would be so useful?”
–Wheeler
“Whew. These got crunched real good.”
–Winona
“Fragmented, like my thoughts!”
–Wortox
“Piece of something dead.”
–Wurt
“It's a bone!”
–Walter
“Whatever these bones belonged to is lost to time.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mảnh xương là một vật phẩm thu được bằng cách đập các bộ xương. Chúng được sử dụng để chế tạo Saddlehorn.
